name: mosga-community-data
description: Community dataset repository scaffold. CI re-scans every incoming record with the PINNED @mosga/sanitizer engine (byte-identical to the contributor's local pre-check), and a canary self-test proves the gate is alive on every run.
comment: The @mosga/sanitizer and @mosga/publisher versions below are PINNED EXACTLY (no ^ / ~) to the sanitizerPackageVersion recorded in contributors' provenance stamps. This is the m3 invariant: CI must re-scan with a byte-identical engine, not merely the same rule text. Bump these only in lockstep with a coordinated ruleset/engine release.
